title: rubus rubeolus
intro: Rubus rubeolus, also known as the red raspberry leaf plant, is a perennial plant belonging to the rose family, characterized by its distinctive red or purple leaves and edible fruits. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus rubeolus include reducing menstrual cramps and promoting uterine health in women, as well as helping to alleviate digestive issues and soothe skin irritations. Rubus rubeolus is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
